population_scope: transdiagnostic psychiatry cohort with affective or psychotic illness history
diagnosis_coverage: Broad psychiatric illness vs healthy comparison; README cites affective or psychotic illness history, but public participants.tsv only exposes Patient vs GenPop groups.
symptom_scales: PANSS; CGI; MADRS; PDSS; YMRS; CSSRS
cognition_scales: Shipley; CFQ; Test My Brain; Stroop; Hammer
longitudinal_coverage: No repeated public follow-up visits are described in the accession metadata or README.
outcome_availability: Poor functional outcome is potentially benchmarkable via LIFE-RIFT and MCAS; public metadata does not confirm one-year nonremission, persistent negative symptoms, or relapse follow-up.
site_structure: two public sites (Yale Brain Imaging Center and McLean Hospital) per README
sample_size_note: README describes 241 participants (148 psychiatric, 93 healthy), while participants.tsv currently lists 245 rows (149 Patient, 96 GenPop).
known_limitations: Diagnosis granularity is weak in public participant metadata, and the public release does not document longitudinal follow-up needed for remission, persistence, or relapse endpoints.
audit_summary: Public transdiagnostic MRI cohort with same-visit functioning endpoints and multi-site structure, but no prospectively usable public outcome window. The public label space is still too broad to count as narrow benchmark support for psychosis heterogeneity.

dataset_label: EEG: First Episode Psychosis vs. Control Resting Task 1
diagnosis_coverage: participants.tsv lists 50 Psychosis and 32 Control participants.
longitudinal_coverage: No repeated follow-up visits are described in the accession metadata or README.
outcome_availability: Poor functional outcome is potentially benchmarkable via GAF/GAS and SFS; public metadata does not confirm one-year nonremission, persistent negative symptoms, or relapse follow-up.
site_structure: single public accession; README notes Task 1 includes a subset of a second acquisition but does not claim a multi-site cohort
known_limitations: Public metadata describes cross-sectional assessments at scan time, so remission, persistence, and relapse endpoints are not currently supported.
audit_summary: Public first-episode psychosis EEG cohort with symptom, cognition, and same-visit functioning measures. It supports a narrow concurrent outcome benchmark, but not a prospective outcome claim.
